label_verbatim: (signature of applicant) / (type or print name and capacity)
rationale: Printed name and capacity of the applicant. Shape D primitive ('printed_name_and_capacity') applied under the applicant.* role prefix instead of filing.signer.* — the form has no separate filing-signer because the applicant is the filer.
